consts:
Profile byte layout for public HNeRV frontier archives.

This is a deconstruction tool, not a scorer. It reads a contest archive, extracts
the single charged payload member, and emits deterministic section bytes,
SHA-256, and entropy so late-public-submission ideas can feed repacking and
Lagrangian allocation work without relying on prose notes.
doc:
Profile byte layout for public HNeRV frontier archives.

This is a deconstruction tool, not a scorer. It reads a contest archive, extracts
the single charged payload member, and emits deterministic section bytes,
SHA-256, and entropy so late-public-submission ideas can feed repacking and
Lagrangian allocation work without relying on prose notes.

  2           2 LOAD_CONST               0 ('Profile byte layout for public HNeRV frontier archives.\n\nThis is a deconstruction tool, not a scorer. It reads a contest archive, extracts\nthe single charged payload member, and emits deterministic section bytes,\nSHA-256, and entropy so late-public-submission ideas can feed repacking and\nLagrangian allocation work without relying on prose notes.\n')
